summary: Completed frontend testing of Design Pack UI components: LoginPageV2, HelpPageV3, DashboardCommandCenter, QuoteDetailWithPayment, and EmptyState. All features working correctly. Fixed Navbar.js Login button routing from /auth to /login.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Design Pack UI components fully tested and working. Fixed Navbar.js Login button to navigate to /login instead of /auth.

LoginPageV2 at /login.details: Split-screen branded login page with KONEKT branding, welcome message, feature highlights, email/password inputs, and Sign In button. All data-testid attributes present.

LoginPageV2 login flow.details: Successfully logs in with demo.customer@konekt.com / Demo123! and redirects to /dashboard using window.location.href for full page reload.

DashboardCommandCenter at /dashboard.details: Shows welcome message with user name, stats cards (Quotes, Orders, Invoices), Recent Activity section with quote/order items, Quick Actions section with navigation links.

HelpPageV3 at /dashboard/help.details: CTA-driven help center with hero section, Browse Products and Request Service CTA buttons, help cards (Ordering Products, Requesting Services, Payments & Tracking), FAQ section, Quick Actions, and Talk to Sales CTA.

/login redirects to /dashboard if logged.details: When user is already logged in and navigates to /login, they are automatically redirected to /dashboard via useEffect check.

CustomerRoute redirects to /login when n.details: Protected routes like /dashboard correctly redirect to /login (not /auth) when user is not authenticated.

Navbar Login button goes to /login.details: Fixed Navbar.js to navigate to /login instead of /auth. Both desktop button and mobile bottom nav now correctly route to /login.

QuoteDetailWithPayment page.details: Quote detail page shows quote number, status badge, created date, line items table, VAT calculation, delivery address, payment information with bank transfer details, quote validity date, and Pay Now button for pending quotes.

EmptyState component.details: Component exists with variants (default, minimal) and specialized exports (EmptyQuotes, EmptyOrders, EmptyInvoices, EmptyCart). Not visible in current test as user has existing quotes.

Navbar.js Login button routing.issue: Desktop Login button navigated to /auth instead of /login
Navbar.js Login button routing.fix: Changed navigate('/auth') to navigate('/login') on line 203

Navbar.js Mobile bottom nav routing.issue: Mobile bottom nav Account/Login link went to /auth instead of /login
Navbar.js Mobile bottom nav routing.fix: Changed to={user ? '/dashboard' : '/auth'} to to={user ? '/dashboard' : '/login'} on line 337
